channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind July 13, 2026
item.description: Assessing the efficacy of adding bilateral erector spinae plane blocks to standard multimodal analgesia for reducing opioid use in patients.

item.title: Another tick-borne disease to avoid: Anaplasmosis in Canada
item.description: Anaplasmosis, the second most common tick-borne illness in Canada, is emerging as a new health concern beyond Lyme disease.

item.title: Emergency doctors are stressed out—and patient irritation plays a significant role
item.description: The HBO drama "The Pitt" highlights the emotional toll of emergency medicine, where patient frustration contributes to physician stress.

item.title: Gene discovery may unlock infertility, early menopause clues
item.description: A new gene discovery could provide insights into age-related fertility decline and early menopause, which affect many women.
